note_text: Wound note - Leftbuttock. Meas 6.3x3.9x0.7cm. Light serosang drainage, no odor. Wound bed 45% gran, 55% slough. Periwound macerated. Alginate dsg applied. Pt c/o discomfort w/ dsg change. Dr. Oduya notified.
